span.p:
训练数据 (X, Y)
由已知 CRF 模型采样生成

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
坐标压缩
x, y → 整数索引

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
计算经验分布
d1: P̃(x,y), d2: P̃(x)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
计算特征期望
d3: EP(tk), d4: EP(sl)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
计算特征计数
nn: f#(x,y)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
定义目标函数 L(w)
= log Z(x) - Score(x,y)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
重复: 计算梯度→确定方向→
黄金分割找步长→更新权重
→更新 Hessian 近似
